title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Gilgamesh and Aga
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Gilgamesh and Aga.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Gilgamesh and Aga.

translation.text: From 'Gilgamesh and Aga': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
